question:
Care dintre urmatoarele afirmatii este corecta?
Code:
Se considera urmatoarea secventa de cod sursa C cu privire la operatia de cautare a unui student intr-o tabela de dispersie implementata cu mecanism avand numele studentului cu rol de cheie (functia cautaHTable)

answers.text: Implementarea operatiei de cautare este incorecta deoarece functia hash permite accesul direct la lista de studenti care au generat conflict pe aceeasi pozitie.
Implementarea operatiei de cautare este incorecta deoarece functia hash genereaza valori plasate in afara zonei alocate pentru tabela de dispersie.
Implementarea operatiei de cautare este incorecta deoarece functia hash nu poate fi utilizata pentru nume student.
Implementarea operatiei de cautare este corecta deoarece se utilizeaza exclusiv accesul secvential la datele stocate in tabela de dispersie.
Implementarea operatiei de cautare este corecta deoarece se utilizeaza functia hash urmata de cautarea secventiala a studentului.

question: When implementing a hash table with separate chaining, which statement is true?

answers.text: Each key is stored directly at the index computed by the hash function.
Collisions are resolved by probing the next available slot in the array.
The hash table can be implemented without an array, using only linked lists.
Each array slot contains a linked list of all keys that hash to that slot.

question: Which of the following best describes an AVL tree?

answers.text: A binary search tree where the height of left and right subtrees of any node differs by at most 1.
A binary tree where every level is completely filled except possibly the last.
A tree where the depth of the left subtree is always greater than the right subtree.
A self-organizing search tree that uses splay operations on every access.
A binary tree where the in-order traversal yields a sorted sequence.

question: Which of the following is true about chaining in hash tables?

answers.text: Chaining cannot handle more than 2 collisions per slot.
Chaining uses an array of linked lists to handle collisions.
Chaining replaces the array with a single linked list.
Chaining only works for integer keys.

question: In an AVL tree, what condition triggers a rebalancing operation?

answers.text: The height of the tree exceeds log2(n).
A node's left and right subtree heights differ by more than 1.
The tree contains duplicate values.
The in-order traversal does not produce a sorted sequence.
The depth of a leaf is exactly 1.

question: What happens during a right rotation in an AVL tree?

answers.text: The left child becomes the new root, and the previous root becomes its right child.
The right child becomes the new root, and the previous root becomes its left child.
Both children of the unbalanced node are swapped.
All nodes in the subtree are shifted one level down.
The root pointer is updated to point to the right subtree.

question: Which property must a hash function satisfy to be considered good?

answers.text: It must produce a unique value for every input.
It must always map distinct keys to the same value.
It must be deterministic and distribute keys uniformly across the table.
It must be a one-way function.
It must be reversible for all inputs.

question: What does the load factor of a hash table measure?

answers.text: The ratio of empty slots to occupied slots.
The ratio of keys to the number of slots in the table.
The total memory used by the table in bytes.
The maximum number of collisions possible.

answers.text: Insertion
Search

question: Care dintre urmatoarele afirmatii sunt adevarate cu privire la un arbore binar de cautare echilibrat (AVL)? Selectati unul sau mai multe:

answers.text: Un arbore AVL este un arbore binar de cautare in care, pentru orice nod, diferenta dintre inaltimile subarborilor stang si drept este cel mult 1.

Un arbore AVL este intotdeauna complet (toate nivelurile sunt pline cu exceptia posibila a ultimului nivel).
